Web Service Endpoint# GET /v1/appInfos/{id}/relationships/primaryCategory

App Store Connect API 3.6+## [URL](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/get-v1-appinfos-_id_-relationships-primarycategory#url)



```
GET https://api.appstoreconnect.apple.com/v1/appInfos/{id}/relationships/primaryCategory
```

## [Path Parameters](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/get-v1-appinfos-_id_-relationships-primarycategory#path-parameters)

`id``string` (Required)
